summary: Context switching feature fully tested. All Production/Sales navigation, context switcher, production module pages, and department field in Team Management are working correctly.
passed_tests: Context switcher visible in sidebar for Director role user
Sales button visible in context switcher
Production button visible in context switcher
Clicking 'Production' switches to Production context
Production context redirects to /maintenance page
Production navigation shows: Maintenance, Inventory, Quality Control (PRODUCTION section)
Production navigation shows: Assets, Vendors (ASSETS & VENDORS section)
Production navigation shows: SKU Management (PRODUCT & SKU section - shared)
Production navigation shows: Files & Documents (DOCUMENTS section)
Production navigation shows: Company Profile, Team (ORGANIZATION section)
Maintenance page loads correctly with sample data (data-testid='maintenance-page')
Inventory page loads correctly with sample data (data-testid='inventory-page')
Quality Control page loads correctly with sample data (data-testid='quality-control-page')
Assets page loads correctly with sample data (data-testid='assets-page')
Vendors page loads correctly with sample data (data-testid='vendors-page')
Clicking 'Sales' switches back to Sales context
Sales context redirects to /dashboard page
Sales navigation shows: Dashboard, Leads, Pipeline, Accounts, Sales Portal
Sales navigation shows: Lead Discovery, Targets, Daily Status, Team Status
Department field present in Add Team Member form (data-testid='team-department-select')
Department dropdown has 'Sales' option
Department dropdown has 'Production' option
Department dropdown has 'Both (Admin)' option
Department field present in Edit User form
Team Management page loads correctly (data-testid='team-management-page')
critical_code_review_comments: Context switcher implementation is clean with proper data-testid attributes
AppContextContext correctly handles user role/department-based access
Production navigation groups properly filtered based on user role
Department field properly integrated in both Add and Edit user forms
All production pages are placeholder pages with sample data as expected
context_for_next_testing_agent: Context switching between Sales and Production contexts is fully functional. Director role can access both contexts via toggle buttons at top of sidebar. Production modules (Maintenance, Inventory, Quality Control, Assets, Vendors) are placeholder pages with sample data. SKU Management is shared between both contexts. Department field added to user forms with options: Sales, Production, Both (Admin).
